examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the single service 'catchpoint' preselects its only auth method, bearer_token. Fill in the API v2 key (secureJsonData "catchpoint.token", empty here) to get a working datasource.

apiKey.description: Authenticate against https://io.catchpoint.com/api/v2 with a Catchpoint REST API v2 Key provided as the write-only secret at secureJsonData "catchpoint.token".
